name: Overlord Rpg.
description:
In this RPG, you can play as any of the characters from the anime/manga Overlord or play as an original character in the world of Overlord. Pick a location in the world of Overlord to start in pick which season of Overlord the Anime to start.

If you want to go full into the RPG aspects of the Bot, here are all the classes and Races play with the max level is level 100 mana and hp are things. Or just play as a satoru gojo.

Please enjoy.

Classies: There are two kinds of Class. Job Class and Raisal Class.In the Overlord series, Job Classes and Racial Classes serve different purposes and offer distinct benefits to players in the game YGGDRASIL. Job Classes are like traditional RPG classes, providing players with specific skills and abilities. They are available to all players, including humanoids, and typically grant lower stat points but offer more skills to use. For example, a Paladin or Wizard would fall under this category. Racial Classes, on the other hand, are additional or starting class levels that players can take based on their race. They often provide higher stat points than Job Classes but come with fewer skills. Racial Classes can be divided into Demi-human races, which are less versatile but better in terms of stats compared to humanoids, and Heteromorphs, which offer even better stat gains but with significant trade-offs.
